name: Brother Aldric
species: Human (post-Rift exposure — minor reality scarring visible on skin)
rank: Second — Thane's enforcer and doctrinal interpreter
sd_appearance: Human, tall and lean, post-Rift exposure reveals frozen ripples on forearms. Grey wrappings cloak his average build, a warhammer and crossbow rest at his side. Chain mail and scale mail, worn and battle-scarred, attest to past contracts. One eye too still, gaze unwavering. A peculiar, shimmering amulet, shaped like a key, glimmers around his neck, hinting at a secret belonging to Brother Aldric, enforcer of Brother Thane's Cult.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
